LanguageData.RICS.Kick.EnableIntegrationTooltip: Turn Kick chat on/off. When enabled, viewers can buy pawns, trigger events, etc.
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.ChannelSlugTooltip: Your Kick channel name (the part after kick.com/)
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.ClientIdTooltip: Get this from your Kick Developer Portal
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.ClientSecretTooltip: Never share this! Paste once — it is stored securely and never shown in plain text.
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.PasteSecretTooltip: Pastes from clipboard and masks for security
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.AutoConnectTooltip: Connect to Kick automatically when RimWorld starts
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.CannotConnectTooltip: Fill in Channel Slug, Client ID and Client Secret first
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.QuickTip: 💡 Get your keys at dev.kick.com — keep Client Secret private!
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.LiveWarning: ⚠️ You must be LIVE streaming on Kick.com to connect!
LanguageData.RICS.Kick.ReqActive: Kick requires an active stream for chatroom access.
